raw_output_payload.reasoning: Need command: find /workspace -type f -print0 | xargs -0 md5sum | sort? But need filename printed first: md5sum outputs "md5 filename". That's fine. So just: find /workspace -type f -print0 | xargs -0 md5sum.
raw_output_payload.reasoning_content: Need command: find /workspace -type f -print0 | xargs -0 md5sum | sort? But need filename printed first: md5sum outputs "md5 filename". That's fine. So just: find /workspace -type f -print0 | xargs -0 md5sum.
